name: Nitrogen Fixation Process
description: Nitrogen Fixation Process in Plants/Bacteria. This process represents a higher-level biological mechanism distinct from molecular/biochemical processes covered in GLMP.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A31[Atmospheric N2] --> B31[Nitrogenase Enzyme]
    B31 --> C31[Reduction Reaction]
    C31 --> D31[NH3 Production]
    D31 --> E31[Assimilation]
    E31 --> F31[Amino Acid Synthesis]
    F31 --> G31[Protein Formation]
    G31 --> H31[Plant Growth]
    
    style A31 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B31 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style C31 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style D31 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style E31 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style F31 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style G31 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style H31 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology
sources.notes: Higher-level biological process visualization: Nitrogen Fixation Process. Created using the Programming Framework methodology for organismal and ecological process analysis.

sources.title: X-ray structure of the Azotobacter vinelandii nitrogenase MoFe protein at 2.7 A resolution.
Molecular mechanisms of nitrogenase and the prospect of artificial nitrogen fixation.

notes: Higher-level biological process. GLMP covers biochemical/molecular processes; this database covers organismal/ecological processes.
